scenarios.scenario: Agent is creating a new OpenCode tool and needs to validate the Zod schema design
scenarios.expected_behavior: Skill's Zod reliability matrix shows z.string/number/boolean → ✅ Reliable, z.transform/refine/lazy → ❌ Silent failure
scenarios.pass_condition: Agent avoids using z.transform()/z.refine()/z.lazy() in tool schema based on the reliability matrix

scenarios.scenario: Agent tries to await context.ask() and gets unexpected behavior (returns Effect, not Promise)
scenarios.expected_behavior: Skill's gotcha #2 documents: 'context.ask() returns Effect, not Promise — await does nothing; use Effect.runPromise()'
scenarios.pass_condition: Agent finds gotcha #2 and replaces await with Effect.runPromise() pattern

scenarios.scenario: Agent needs to decide whether to implement a feature as a tool or a hook
scenarios.expected_behavior: Skill's tool vs hook decision tree correctly routes based on LLM visibility, behavior modification, observation, and lifecycle events
scenarios.pass_condition: Agent follows decision tree and correctly selects tool or hook based on feature requirements
